(includes vented front + lock box + cushion + hooks + digital lock + shipping from Vietnam to Canada)

Model 18" 20" 22" 24" 26" 28" 30" 32"

Profit Per Locker — Base Price Only (USD × 1.38 = CAD)
(no accessories)

Model 18" 20" 22" 24" 26" 28" 30" 32"
Notes
• All prices are in Canadian Dollars (CAD).
• No depth surcharge — 19" and 24" depths are the same price (where available).
• Bottom cushion and Top & bottom cushions are mutually exclusive — selecting one deselects the other.
• All lockers custom-built in 8–12 weeks. Five year warranty included.
• Shipping and installation quoted separately.
• For custom dimensions, wood species, or volume pricing — contact sales@playerstall.com or call 1 888 584 1444.
• Prices subject to change. Confirm with sales before quoting.
